name: Seafile
description: Manage files on a Seafile instance: list libraries, browse directories, search, download, share, and manage files

credentials_required.label: Seafile Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your Seafile server (e.g. https://seafile.example.com) — no trailing slash. Works with Seafile Cloud and self-hosted.

credentials_required.label: Seafile API Token
credentials_required.hint: API token — obtain via POST /api2/auth-token/ with username+password, or generate in Seafile web UI under Settings > Web API Auth Token

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and folders in a library directory

tools.name: get_file_detail
tools.description: Get metadata for a file (size, last modified, etc.)

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Get a file download link or read text file content inline

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files across libraries by keyword

tools.name: create_share_link
tools.description: Create a public share link for a file or folder

tools.name: file_operation
tools.description: Rename, move, or copy a file

author: freddy-schuetz
